node.text:
Before the stage. Before the world knew your name. 
You were always an Original. 
Timeless. Pioneer. Icon.

node.text: No existen sueños grandes ni sueños pequeños.

Crafted in premium materials that take things up a notch, The adidas Originals x Willy Chavarria 2026 Megaride is an invitation to walk beyond gravity and express yourself with complete freedom. Textures that evoke a density that challenges convention — shapes shifts, transforms, and emerges to another dimension.

Signs-ups open now. Willy Chavarria Megaride available on Confirmed App and at global retailers January 30th.

Marking the dawn of @edisonchen’s new universe, we trace back to the first signs of possibility—where animation becomes a doorway to hidden potential and futures waiting to unfold. Edison’s vision offers the key, opening the path into new worlds ahead.
 
Chapter One coming soon.

node.text:
Fitted footballers.​

Adistar Control 5 street style.

A lost Y2K sports tape reimagined for today. adidas Originals x Brain Dead Y2K launches today. Where chaotic nostalgia meets forward-thinking design. ​
​
Available now on CONFIRMED and select retailers.

Step into Brain Dead’s surreal world with some of the most iconic adidas technologies. Introducing the adidas Originals x Brain Dead Y2K collection. Available on December 18th on the CONFIRMED app and in select retail stores.

node.text: Adistar styled six ways ⭐ @eliannaarvizu
Refinement meets rebellion. The @WillyChavarria SS26 collection is a bold statement of cultural pride and athletic elegance.

When the Jabbar Hi met Mark Gonzales.

📸 @zandertaketomo
🎞️ @huntfilmwork

#adidasSkateboarding #MarkGonzales

A tribute to one of the most electrifying players in basketball history. ​
​
The Fear of God Athletics II Basketball D Rose Collection.​
​
Lo available December 5th globally and Hi available exclusively at SVRN in Chicago.
